user_message: Hey, can you draft the follow-up for Coho Winery? Board meeting is next week.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Eric Kim <eric.kim@cohowinery.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-28 12:10 EST
Subject: Re: whitespace analysis Discussion - Next Steps

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about whitespace analysis. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Eric Kim <eric.kim@cohowinery.com>
Date: 2024-02-21 13:39 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Coho Winery whitespace analysis

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about whitespace analysis. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Eric Kim <eric.kim@cohowinery.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-21 10:53 EST
Subject: Re: whitespace analysis Discussion - Next Steps

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with whitespace analysis. What are the next steps from your side?

Meeting: whitespace analysis Discussion - Coho Winery
Date: 2024-02-24
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Eric Kim (Coho Winery), Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft), Priya (Coho Winery)

[00:01:15] Eric Kim (Coho Winery): Appreciate everyone making time. The main agenda today is whitespace analysis.

[00:07:00] Eric Kim (Coho Winery): On the whitespace analysis front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around vendor dependencies.

[00:09:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is data residency.

[00:13:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): Our team lead reviewed this and has concerns about timeline constraints. Can we address those?

[00:17:00] Priya (Coho Winery): The timeline for performance requirements is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:22:00] Eric Kim (Coho Winery): On the whitespace analysis front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around integration complexity.

[00:27:00] Priya (Coho Winery): The timeline for resource allocation is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:32:00] Priya (Coho Winery): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is timeline constraints.

[00:36:00] Eric Kim (Coho Winery): On the whitespace analysis front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around performance requirements.

usability_anchors: Score 5: Complete, well-structured output matching the Pre-Meeting Brief template with all required artifacts present and actionable
Score 3: Output covers main requirements but missing one or two secondary artifacts or lacking specificity
Score 1: Output is generic, missing key artifacts, or fails to address the specific request
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct whitespace analysis decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
